sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72871" key="o)ktwkaieikosi/fqoggos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτωκαιεικοσίφθογγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72871.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of twenty-eight notes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg004:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicom.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Exc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
